display_name: Text-to-image generation and image editing with Flux 2 [klein] 9B Base from Black Forest Labs. Enhanced realism, crisper text rendering within images, and native editing capabilities. Send up to 3 ima
description:
Text-to-image generation and image editing with Flux 2 [klein] 9B Base from Black Forest Labs. Enhanced realism, crisper text rendering within images, and native editing capabilities. Send up to 3 images (jpeg/ png/ webp) to use for image editing or as references.

Optional parameters:
- Set aspect ratio. Select from (16:9, 4:3, 1:1, 3:4, 9:16). It is set to 4:3 aspect ratio as default.
